rationale.completeness: All 7 functional requirements are implemented: automatic session creation, conversation persistence (JSONL), session resumption, listing, metadata tracking, context reconstruction, and deletion. All CLI flags (--session, --list-sessions, --delete-session, --json) are present. Minor deviations in output format vs spec.
rationale.correctness: Core logic is sound: JSONL append for crash-resilience, resilient line parsing, proper CRUD operations. Edge cases handled (missing directories, empty files, malformed JSON). One fragile pattern: directly mutating InMemoryChatHistory internal messages array in resume(). No error handling around saveExchange() could mask persistence failures.
rationale.style: Follows project patterns: SessionStore mirrors gateway store.ts, SessionHistory follows Scratchpad JSONL pattern, hand-rolled arg parsing matches gateway. TypeScript typing is consistent. Clean barrel exports. Minor inconsistency: error messages formatted differently than spec.
rationale.quality: Well-organized with clear separation: types, id, store, history, manager modules. Comprehensive test coverage with temp directory isolation. Some CLI integration code in cli.ts/index.tsx is dense but readable. Good use of Zod schemas for validation.
